item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, nilai kolektif memang sering diutamakan, tapi itu bukan berarti hak individu tidak diperhatikan.

notes: Agent A begins clearly society-positive, then softens into a contextual balance frame while still saying community needs and social justice are often prioritized in Indonesia. Agent B remains consistently rights-first, with only bounded acknowledgment of social justice and cooperation.
